DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF SIGNATURE'S NETWORK, INC., A CORPORATION DEFENDANT ZOYA SMITHTON'S MOTION TO HAVE REQUEST FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED, DENIED. THE BALANCE OF THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IT APPEARS THAT DISCOVERY RESPONSES WERE SERVED, ALBEIT PERHAPS NOT RECEIVED, BEFORE THE PRESENT MOTION WAS FILED. IF MOVING PARTY CONTENDS THE CURRENT RESPONSES ARE INADEQUATE, IT SHOULD MEET AND CONFER ON THE RESPONSES AND IF NECESSARY FILE A FURTHER MOTION. SANCTIONS REQUEST DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE CURTIS E.A. KARNOW. NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Apr-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
George A. Gallegos, Atty. appeared telephonically for defendant and moving party: Aaron Carter. No appearances made by Plantiff.

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF SIGNATURE'S NETWORK, INC., A CORPORATION DEFENDANT ZOYA SMITHTON's Motion to have Request for Admission deemed admitted, denied. The balance of the motion is denied without prejudice. It appears that discovery responses were served, albeit perhaps not received, before the present motion was filed. If moving party contends the current responses are inadequate, it should meet and confer on the responses and if necessary file a further motion. Sanctions request denied without prejudice. Prevailing party to prepare order. JUDGE CURTIS E.A. KARNOW. NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David C. Phillips, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Signature's Network, Inc.
George A. Gallegos, Atty. appearing telephonically for Defendant and opposing party: Aaron Carter

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Signature's Network, Inc.'s Motion To Strike Opposition To The Application is denied s the opposition was timely filed. C.C.P. Section 484.060(a) provides that: '... the defendant shall file and serve upon the plaintiff no later than five court days prior to the date set for the hearing a notice of opposition.' COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
